title: Multiple-choice cloze
description: Read the text and choose the correct word for each gap.

content.text: The digital revolution has (1) ______ the way we communicate. Gone are the days when we had to wait weeks for a letter to arrive. Today, we can send messages instantly across the globe. However, this immediacy comes at a (2) ______. We now expect instant responses, which can create (3) ______ in both personal and professional relationships. Many experts (4) ______ that this constant connectivity is affecting our ability to (5) ______ deeply. Nevertheless, others argue that technology has (6) ______ us to maintain relationships across vast distances. The (7) ______, they suggest, is to find a balance between digital and (8) ______ communication.

questions.question: Which word best fits gap 1?
questions.explanation: 'Revolutionized' implies a complete and fundamental change, which fits the context of how technology changed communication.

questions.question: Which word best fits gap 2?
questions.explanation: 'At a cost' is a fixed expression meaning there is a negative consequence.

questions.question: Which word best fits gap 3?
questions.explanation: 'Tension' refers to strain in relationships, which fits the context.
